scope_statement: SAMA cybersecurity and IT governance frameworks (CSF, CTI, Red Teaming, Counter-Fraud, IT Governance, BCM, AML/CTF, Operational Risk Insurance) plus IT/cyber/outsourcing/fraud/AML circulars published on the SAMA SharePoint rules portal at https://www.sama.gov.sa/en-US/RulesInstructions/.
scope_exclusions: Arabic-only SAMA publications (English focus for v1)
Confidential SAMA supervisory letters and examination findings
SAMA enforcement actions, penalty decisions, settlement agreements
Non-cybersecurity SAMA regulations (Basel III, IFRS 9, consumer protection)
Guidance from other Saudi regulators (CMA, CST, Zakat/Tax/Customs Authority)

sources.name: SAMA Rules & Instructions
sources.measurement_unit: rows (frameworks + parsed controls + circulars) ingested from SAMA SharePoint portal

access_method.notes: SAMA geo-blocks EU datacentre egress IPs; commercial consumer VPNs do not offer Saudi Arabia exit nodes. Ingestion runs through an SSH SOCKS5 tunnel from an internal Ansvar egress host with a Saudi-routable IP. Host-specific configuration is held in Ansvar's internal runbook and not published.

gaps.reason: PDF text extraction yields partial Arabic; the DB only stores English titles. title_ar column is reserved but not populated.

gaps.topic: SAMA Cyber Threat Intelligence Principles leaf-level controls
gaps.reason: Numbering in the PDF does not map to the standard SAMA L1-L2-L3 hierarchy; framework registered, leaf controls not parseable.
Framework indexed; individual controls not yet parsed.
13 circulars indexed (IT, cyber, outsourcing, fraud, AML from 2015-2024). Historical backfill and full coverage of banking/insurance circulars deferred.

tools.name: sa_sama_search_regulations
tools.description: Full-text search across SAMA controls and circulars.

tools.name: sa_sama_get_regulation
tools.description: Retrieve a specific control or circular by reference.

tools.name: sa_sama_list_sources
tools.description: Data provenance and retrieval method (SOCKS tunnel).

tools.name: sa_sama_check_data_freshness
tools.description: Per-source staleness report read at runtime from coverage.json.
